content: {"version":1,"machineId":"5b0ee8cc-a708-4cac-a1f1-46d23216ac5b","content":"{\"cpp.json\":\"{\\n\\t// Place your snippets for cpp here. Each snippet is defined under a snippet name and has a prefix, body and \\n\\t// description. The prefix is what is used to trigger the snippet and the body will be expanded and inserted. Possible variables are:\\n\\t// $1, $2 for tab stops, $0 for the final cursor position, and ${1:label}, ${2:another} for placeholders. Placeholders with the \\n\\t// same ids are connected.\\n\\t// Example:\\n\\t// \\\"Print to console\\\": {\\n\\t// \\t\\\"prefix\\\": \\\"log\\\",\\n\\t// \\t\\\"body\\\": [\\n\\t// \\t\\t\\\"console.log('$1');\\\",\\n\\t// \\t\\t\\\"$2\\\"\\n\\t// \\t],\\n\\t// \\t\\\"description\\\": \\\"Log output to console\\\"\\n\\t// }\\n\\t\\\"Header guard\\\": {\\n\\t\\t\\\"prefix\\\": \\\"ifndef\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\\"body\\\": [\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\"ifndef __${TM_FILENAME_BASE/(.*)/${1:/upcase}/}__H__\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\"#define __${TM_FILENAME_BASE/(.*)/${1:/upcase}/}__H__\\\\n\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\"$0\\\\n\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\"#endif\\\"\\n\\t\\t],\\n\\t\\t\\\"description\\\": \\\"Header guard\\\"\\n\\t},\\n\\t\\\"Coplien form\\\": {\\n\\t\\t\\\"prefix\\\": \\\"class\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\\"body\\\": [\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\"class ${1:$TM_FILENAME_BASE}\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\"{\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\"\\\\tpublic:\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\"\\\\t\\\\t${1:$TM_FILENAME_BASE}( void );\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\"\\\\t\\\\t${1:$TM_FILENAME_BASE}( ${1:$TM_FILENAME_BASE} const & src );\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\"\\\\t\\\\t~${1:$TM_FILENAME_BASE}( void );\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\"\\\\n\\\\t\\\\t${1:$TM_FILENAME_BASE} &\\\\toperator=( ${1:$TM_FILENAME_BASE} const & rhs );\\\\n\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\t\\\"};\\\"\\n\\t\\t],\\n\\t\\t\\\"description\\\": \\\"Coplien/Canonical form\\\"\\n\\t}\\n}\"}"}
